assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting under IFRS 9 in consolidated financial statements.
The intragroup dividend creates foreign currency exposure.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies fair value hedge as a top-level hedge accounting model and includes foreign currency risk on qualifying intragroup monetary items in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies cash flow hedge as a top-level hedge accounting model and specifically discusses qualifying highly probable forecast intragroup foreign currency exposures in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context separately identifies net investment hedging as a top-level hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk in consolidated financial statements.
